<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Concerns; /** @mixin \Spatie\Ray\Ray */ trait RayColors { public function green(): self { return $this->color('green'); } public function orange(): self { return $this->color('orange'); } public function red(): self { return $this->color('red'); } public function purple(): self { return $this->color('purple'); } public function blue(): self { return $this->color('blue'); } public function gray(): self { return $this->color('gray'); } }
